title: Citros snow cake
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|snow}} {{Food |image=[[File:Pyollian_Cake.png]] |name=Citros snow cake |origin= |date= |race= |creator= |found= |type= |description= |animals= |plants=Wild [[Wheat/Legends|wheat]] |other=Sweet [[Cake/Legends|cake]] mix |edible=[[Human/Legends|Humans]] |inedible= |potable= |nutrition= |effects= |dishes= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|Think this is a drill?''"
"''If it is, the general owes me a dessert.|A [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]|''[[Specter of the Past]]''}} '''Citros snow cake''' was a [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]] enjoyed by [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]. It was made with a sweet cake mix, and included 10 units of wild [[Wheat/Legends|wheat]], 20 pieces of [[Fruit/Legends|fruit]], and a food additive.{{GalaxiesAED}} {{Food-stub}} ==Appearances== *{{GalaxiesAED}} *''[[Specter of the Past]]'' {{Ab|Specter of the Past (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} ==Sources== *[[Star Wars Galaxies: The Total Experience: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars Galaxies: The Total Experience'': Prima Official Game Guide]] *{{SonyCite|url=content.jsp?page=Friday%20Feature:%20The%20Secrets%20of%20Good%20Eating|text=Friday Feature: The Secrets of Good Eating}} *[[Star Wars Galaxies: The Complete Guide: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars Galaxies: The Complete Guide'': Prima Official Game Guide]] ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{SWGWiki|Citros Snow Cake}} [[Category:Cakes]]
